demo.title: Chain-verified call on $MfT
demo.code:
call 0x8FB87d13B40B1A67B22ED1a17e2835fe7e3a9bA3

-> verifies the token on-chain (contract verified? liquidity? price? 24h volume?)
   and posts the verified facts as a call. Facts only, no price predictions.

setup: Charge a 0.01 $BNKR fee FIRST — this on-chain transfer is the TRIGGER (self-tests route to ops 0xE2a4A8b9d77080c57799A94BA8eDeb2Dd6e0aC10)
Fees are never charged in Money for Trees; this fee is $BNKR only
Trigger: a user on X gives a Base token contract address to 'call' / verify
Verify on-chain (basescan/sourcify + Dexscreener), then post the verified facts as ONE post. Facts only — never a price prediction or 'buy'.
Optional: set BASESCAN_API_KEY in env for the strongest contract-verified signal (falls back to keyless sourcify)
